MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Amend Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc To Correct Amount Of Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF EGO PARIS LLC'S Motion To Amend Amount of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc To Correct Amount Of Judgment IS DENIED. THE MISTAKE IS SUBSTANTIVE NOT CLERICAL. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =301/EHG
